failures.observed: --journeys implies autoplay and constructs RuntimeFlow::autoplay(), whose initial screen is Duel.
failures.required: The live journey must traverse Boot -> Menu -> MatchSetup -> Countdown -> Duel rather than starting inside Duel.

failures.observed: The live harness emitted no SG02_LIVE_JOURNEY receipt before the 321-second bounded audit abort and has no per-journey truth-tick timeout.
failures.required: Fail closed within a deterministic truth-tick budget and complete ten accelerated but sequential 60 Hz truth journeys without developer input.

failures.observed: The journey completion path verifies a replay file at Result and immediately rematches; it does not enter and finish RuntimeFlow Replay before rematch.
failures.required: Each audited lifecycle journey must exercise Result -> Replay -> Rematch.

failures.observed: The native Wayland game window existed, but computer_use could not resolve it and direct KWin ScreenShot2 capture returned org.kde.KWin.ScreenShot2.Error.NoAuthorized.
failures.required: Use an authorized native capture path or in-engine GPU readback; do not fabricate a substitute image or click a permission prompt without owner authority.

repair_validation.journey_contact_source: canonical action/root cleanbox packet; QA-only and not visual/contact promotion evidence
repair_validation.audio_observation: Missing r6k_strike_contact.wav failed loudly; no silent substitute was used. Audio completion is outside SG02 and remains a later-wave blocker.

visual_capture.reason: The user was actively using another foreground application. Authorized active-window capture selected that unrelated window, so the image was immediately deleted. The agent did not foreground Just Dodge or click a capture permission prompt.
visual_capture.required: Obtain owner availability for a brief foreground capture or add audited in-engine GPU readback in a separate unit.

scope: obtain owner availability for an authorized Just Dodge foreground capture without disturbing another active application
capture the actual native Boot/Menu/Setup/Countdown/Duel/Result/Replay journey surface
inspect lifecycle readability and confirm the procedural carrier is visibly labeled QA-only rather than production content
attach machine receipts and native captures to Evidence Review for named human decision
